language_prompt: an apple and a plate on the table

static_checks.name: json_schema_parse
static_checks.method: Parse final_placement.json as JSON and check required top-level fields.

static_checks.name: asset_exists
static_checks.method: Verify each object asset_id exists in the asset catalog and RoboTwin assets/objects directory.

static_checks.name: model_id_exists
static_checks.method: Verify each model_id has matching visual, collision, and model_data files.

static_checks.name: pose_in_workspace_bounds
static_checks.method: Check each xyz is inside workspace bounds.

static_checks.name: approx_no_initial_collision
static_checks.method: Use catalog scaled extents and xy positions to estimate whether objects overlap before simulator load.

simulator_smoke_checks.name: robotwin_scene_load
simulator_smoke_checks.method: Load final_placement.json through the RoboTwin placement loader without creating a new task program.

simulator_smoke_checks.name: snap_to_tabletop
simulator_smoke_checks.method: Apply z_policy=snap_to_tabletop_on_load and log final object z positions.

simulator_smoke_checks.name: settling_stability
simulator_smoke_checks.method: Step the simulator briefly and compare object poses before/after settling.

simulator_smoke_checks.name: contact_or_height_sanity
simulator_smoke_checks.method: Confirm apple_1 and plate_1 are on the table, not floating, falling, or penetrating the table.

render_or_visual_checks.name: save_render_evidence
render_or_visual_checks.method: Save at least one image or short video showing the tabletop scene.

render_or_visual_checks.name: object_visibility
render_or_visual_checks.method: Confirm apple and plate are visible from the selected camera.

render_or_visual_checks.name: visual_prompt_match
render_or_visual_checks.method: Human or VLM checks whether the render satisfies: an apple and a plate on the table.

render_or_visual_checks.name: visual_failure_modes
render_or_visual_checks.method: Check for obvious floating, penetration, severe occlusion, wrong asset, or wrong object count.

expected_artifacts: human or VLM visual review result
pass_criteria: RoboTwin loads both objects without errors.
Both objects remain stable on the table after settling.
Render evidence clearly shows one apple and one plate on the table.
No severe collision, floating, falling, or table penetration is visible.
known_pending_items: No simulator smoke has been run yet.
No render image or VLM/human visual review has been produced yet.
